      "text": "9. Un tai Deenaâ meklechu

dsibs/ ko tee irr zaurduhruscht.

tahdas Schehlofchanas/ ka pahr
weeniu weenigu Dehlu / un tee
waidehs ganschi pahr winnu/ ka
kas waid pahr weenu Pirm-
dsimtu.
"

    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "11. Tai Deenaâ buhs eeksch

mona eeksch tahs Eeleijas Me-
gidus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,

Namina fewitschki/ un winnu
Seewas fewitschki. Ta Zilts ta
Lewja Namna fewischki/ un
winnu Seewas fewischki.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "13. Ta Zilts Simejus fe-

"

      "text": "14. Wiſnas zittas Ziltis/ ik-

"

    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "2. Un tai Deenaâ/ fakka tah

"

GA Wahrdà / un winna
